channel.title: DEX by Akif Saeed AI Automation Blog
channel.description: Practical AI automation guides and workflows.

item.title: How an AI Authority Blog Engine Turns Expertise Into Search Traffic
item.description: A practical blueprint for using AI agents, editorial review, SEO checks, images, audio, Slack, Notion, and GitHub to publish helpful business automation content.

item.title: How to Use AI Automation for Small Businesses in a Practical Business Automation Workflow
item.description: Discover how small businesses can implement AI automation effectively with step-by-step workflows, real examples, common mistakes, and actionable next steps.

item.title: AI Customer Support Automation Playbook for Small Service Businesses
item.description: A practical guide to applying AI customer support automation playbook for small service businesses with approval steps, quality checks, and measurable business outcomes.

item.title: Beyond RAG: Why Hypernetworks Are Next for Specialized Business Agents
item.description: Nace.AI’s MetaModel adapts base models on demand for finance, audit and compliance workflows without retraining or huge context windows; it's promising but early.

item.title: Claude Code Artifacts: What They Do, Who Gets Them, and What They Cannot Replace
item.description: Anthropic launched Claude Code Artifacts on June 18, 2026 as a beta feature for Team and Enterprise organizations. It turns Claude Code session output into private, versioned HTML or Markdown pages for internal collaboration.

item.title: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and OpenShell: What Business Automation Teams Should Know
item.description: A practical business-focused guide to NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and OpenShell, explaining what the launch means for enterprise AI agents and automation teams.
